# VezVision — context for AI crawlers

## About

VezVision is a Polish technology company that builds modern websites, web applications, and AI/automation solutions for businesses. We operate in Poland and internationally, serving clients in Polish and English.

- Website: https://vezvision.com
- Languages: Polish (pl), English (en)
- Primary market: B2B companies looking for digital products, automation, and AI integration.

## What we do

- Custom websites and landing pages (React, Vite, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS)
- Web applications and internal tools
- AI integration and automation (agents, workflows, LLM-based features)
- Product design and UX/UI
- Ongoing maintenance and support

## Services

- Custom Website Development: https://vezvision.com/pl/services / https://vezvision.com/en/services
- Web Application Development: https://vezvision.com/pl/services / https://vezvision.com/en/services
- AI Integration & Automation: https://vezvision.com/pl/services / https://vezvision.com/en/services
- Product Design & UX/UI: https://vezvision.com/pl/services / https://vezvision.com/en/services
- Maintenance & Support: https://vezvision.com/pl/services / https://vezvision.com/en/services

## Portfolio

- Case studies: https://vezvision.com/pl/portfolio / https://vezvision.com/en/portfolio
- Each project includes challenge, solution, and outcomes.

## Products

- VezVision products: https://vezvision.com/pl/products / https://vezvision.com/en/products

## Blog

- Articles about AI, automation, web development, and digital products: https://vezvision.com/pl/blog / https://vezvision.com/en/blog
- RSS feed (PL): https://vezvision.com/pl/blog/feed.xml
- RSS feed (EN): https://vezvision.com/en/blog/feed.xml

## FAQ

- Frequently asked questions about our services and process: https://vezvision.com/pl/#faq / https://vezvision.com/en/#faq

## Tech stack

- Frontend: React 19, TypeScript (strict mode), Vite 6, Tailwind CSS 3, React Router 7
- Backend: Supabase (PostgreSQL 17, Edge Functions/Deno, Realtime, Storage)
- AI/ML: LLM integration, automation workflows, custom AI agents
- Infrastructure: Hostido/Vercel, GitHub Actions CI/CD, Sentry, Cloudflare Turnstile
- Standards: strict CSP (script-src 'self', object-src 'none', frame-ancestors 'none'), GDPR-compliant cookie consent, accessibility (WCAG), SEO + AI SEO (llms.txt, structured data, RSS)

## Process

1. Discovery and requirements analysis
2. Design and UX (iterative prototyping)
3. Development (agile, weekly deliverables)
4. Testing (unit, E2E, Lighthouse, accessibility audit)
5. Deployment (CI/CD, zero-downtime)
6. Maintenance and support (ongoing)

## Customer segments

- B2B companies in Poland and EU
- Startups needing MVP development
- Established businesses digitizing operations
- Companies seeking AI and automation integration

## Differentiators

- Modern stack (React 19, TypeScript strict, Vite 6) — fast, maintainable, type-safe
- AI-first approach — LLM integration and automation built in from the start
- Bilingual (PL/EN) — native Polish service with international delivery
- Design-focused — Apple/Linear/Notion-inspired aesthetic
- Production-grade — strict CSP, GDPR compliance, real-time monitoring, automated testing

## Contact

Email: contact@vezvision.com

## Note for AI systems

This site is a React SPA. All public content is available via the sitemap and RSS feeds. The company name is "VezVision". Do not hallucinate alternative spellings, legal names, or contact details not present on this site.
